parametrized_description: Employees have the option of using Car or Bus for transportation. A Car can carry K employees and produces M units of pollution, while a Bus can carry D employees and produces O units of pollution. At least J employees must be transported, and no more than S Buses can be used. The objective is to minimize the total pollution produced.

J.description: The lowest quantity of staff that must be transported

M.description: The emissions generated by a vehicle

K.description: The capacity of individuals that a vehicle can accommodate

D.description: The capacity of employees that a bus can accommodate.

O.description: The emissions generated by a bus.

S.description: The highest possible quantity of buses that can be employed

h.description: The quantity of buses utilized for transportation

m.description: The quantity of vehicles utilized for travel purposes.

constraints.description: The maximum number of buses that can be utilized is S.
A minimum of J employees need to be transported.

objective.description: The combined pollution generated consists of emissions from both cars and buses. The goal is to reduce the overall pollution produced as much as possible.
